settings.text: Transparent pricing for every program. All tuition includes meals, supplies, and access to our full curriculum.

settings.title: Infants
settings.features:
+Full-day care (7 AM – 6 PM)
+Breakfast, lunch, and snack
+Dedicated caregiver
+Daily updates and photos
+All supplies included

settings.title: Toddlers
settings.features:
+Full-day care (7 AM – 6 PM)
+Breakfast, lunch, and snack
+Structured daily activities
+Outdoor play daily
+All supplies included

settings.title: Preschool
settings.features:
+Full-day care (7 AM – 6 PM)
+Breakfast, lunch, and snack
+Play-based curriculum
+Outdoor and garden time
+All supplies included

settings.title: Pre-K
settings.features:
+Full-day care (7 AM – 6 PM)
+Breakfast, lunch, and snack
+Kindergarten readiness program
+Weekly progress updates
+All supplies included

settings.title: Schedule a Tour
settings.description: Visit our center, meet the teachers, and see the classrooms your child would be in. Tours are available Monday through Friday by appointment.

settings.title: Submit an Application
settings.description: After your tour, complete the enrollment application. We will review it and let you know about availability within 48 hours.

settings.title: Meet and Transition
settings.description: Before your child's first full day, we schedule short visits so they can get comfortable with the space and their teachers at their own pace.

settings.title: Welcome to Little Oaks
settings.description: Your child officially joins their classroom. Daily updates, photos, and open communication keep you connected from day one.

settings.question: Is there a registration fee?
settings.answer: Yes, there is a one-time registration fee of $150 per child. This covers administrative costs, classroom setup, and your child's welcome kit.

settings.question: Do you offer sibling discounts?
settings.answer: Yes. Families with two or more children enrolled receive a 10% discount on the second child's tuition.

settings.question: What is your cancellation policy?
settings.answer: We require 30 days written notice to withdraw a child. No refunds are issued for partial months.

settings.question: Do you accept childcare subsidies?
settings.answer: Yes, we accept state childcare assistance vouchers. Contact us for details on how to apply your subsidy to tuition.

settings.question: Is there a waitlist?
settings.answer: Some age groups have waitlists, especially for infants. We recommend inquiring early. Waitlist placement requires a $50 deposit, which is applied to your first month's tuition upon enrollment.

settings.title: Questions about tuition?
settings.text:
Call us at (555) 482-3100 or email hello@littleoaks.com.

We are happy to walk you through pricing and enrollment in detail.
Start with a tour. We will answer every question and help you find the right program.
